samples.target_compile_errors:
error: unwinding panics are not supported without std
  |
  = help: using nightly cargo, use -Zbuild-std with panic="abort" to avoid unwinding
  = note: since the core library is usually precompiled with panic="unwind", rebuilding your crate with panic="abort" may not be enough to fix the problem

error[E0580]: `main` function has wrong type
  --> benchmark_results/2026-05-10T00-24-35/gpt-4o-mini/declarations/function_specifiers_2/sample_001/target.rs:27:14
   |
27 | fn main() -> ! {
   |              ^ expected `()`, found `!`
   |
   = note: expected signature `fn() -> ()`
              found signature `fn() -> !`

error[E0317]: `if` may be missing an `else` clause
  --> benchmark_results/2026-05-10T00-24-35/gpt-4o-mini/declarations/function_specifiers_2/sample_001/target.rs:22:5
   |
21 |   fn g(i: i32) -> ! {
   |                   - expected `!` because of this return type
22 | /     if i > 0 {
23 | |         stop();
24 | |     }
   | |_____^ expected `!`, found `()`
   |
   = note:   expected type `!`
           found unit type `()`
   = note: `if` expressions without `else` evaluate to `()`
   = help: consider adding an `else` block that evaluates to the expected type

warning: variable `x` is assigned to, but never used
  --> benchmark_results/2026-05-10T00-24-35/gpt-4o-mini/declarations/function_specifiers_2/sample_001/target.rs:11:13
   |
11 |     let mut x = 0;
   |             ^
   |
   = note: consider using `_x` instead
   = note: `#[warn(unused_variables)]` (part of `#[warn(unused)]`) on by default

error: aborting due to 3 previous errors; 1 warning emitted

Some errors have detailed explanations: E0317, E0580.
For more information about an error, try `rustc --explain E0317`.

error: declaration of a `no_mangle` function
 --> benchmark_results/2026-05-10T00-24-35/gpt-4o-mini/declarations/function_specifiers_2/sample_002/target.rs:6:1
  |
6 | #[no_mangle]
  | ^^^^^^^^^^^^
  |
  = note: the linker's behavior with multiple libraries exporting duplicate symbol names is undefined and Rust cannot provide guarantees when you manually override them
  = note: requested on the command line with `-F unsafe-code`

error: unwinding panics are not supported without std

13 |

   |     ^^^^^^^ unreachable expression
